## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue (link it using `Fixes #` or `Closes #`).

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code cleanup / Refactoring
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have formatted my code locally (`dart format` or PEP8 rules).
- [ ] `flutter analyze` runs clean without issues.
- [ ] I have executed unit tests and they pass.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
